name: io.github.browncabinet/tablecharts-mcp-server
title: TableCharts
description: Turn JSON, CSV, or URLs (Notion, Google Sheets, Salesforce) into beautiful hosted interactive dashboards.

environmentVariables.name: TABLECHARTS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your TableCharts API key from tablecharts.co (starts with tc_live_...)

environmentVariables.name: TABLECHARTS_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Optional base URL for the TableCharts API
